forbidden_staging_policy.broad_staging_absolute_ban: git add -A and git add . are EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN. Only explicit per-file or per-group git add is permitted in P191.
forbidden_staging_policy.pre_stage_wal_checkpoint: Before staging lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db: run 'sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)' to ensure clean DB file with no WAL residue.
forbidden_staging_policy.post_add_scan_required: After every git add step: run 'git diff --cached --name-only' and verify no forbidden files appear in staged set.

commit_message_proposal.subject: P182-P190: reconcile replay DB and post-migration governance
body: P182: backport 42 research artifacts (P161-P181), 5 analysis scripts,
21 contract tests, and conftest skip markers from zen-gates to main.
No DB write; main was still 54462 rows, bet_index ABSENT.
P183-P185: controlled DB migration rehearsal (temp copy only).
P183: 11-step plan; found TABLE RECREATION required (ALTER TABLE insufficient).
P184: schema rehearsal; MAX(id) dedup 54462->54302 base rows.
P185: row-delta import; 40622 rows added; final 94924 exact match zen-gates.
P186-P187: production migration authorization gate + 13-item dry-run checklist.
MAX(id) dedup policy and exact SQL approved before production write.
P188: production DB migration executed.
bet_index: ABSENT -> PRESENT (NOT NULL DEFAULT 1)
Dropped: 160 duplicate rows (all NULL provenance)
Imported: 40622 multi-bet rows (bet_index 2-5)
Backup: backups/p188_lottery_v2_backup_20260601_153821.db (54462 rows, verified)
PRAGMA integrity_check: ok | No controlled_apply | No POWER_LOTTO research rerun
P189: post-migration verification + test repair.
Drift guard updated: total=94924, legacy=420
9 stale pre-migration assertions repaired (P183-P187 contract tests)
Full test suite: 644 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped
P190: commit readiness audit + staging whitelist plan.
Staged: 0 (P190 plan-only; stage/commit/push deferred to P191)
Governance:
POWER_LOTTO R2 research: CLOSED (P178A) — no promotion, no wagering guidance
Second-zone SZC1/SZC2: display-only governance enforced
main/zen-gates DB split: RECONCILED
DB-level reconciliation: COMPLETE; not yet committed (awaiting P191 authorization)

p191_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P191 stage commit push authorization gate only
p191_authorization_options.description: P191 produces a per-file staging authorization gate with forbidden scan. Plan only — no git add.

p191_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P191 stage reviewed files and create local commit only, no push
p191_authorization_options.description: P191 stages the reviewed whitelist and creates a local commit. Does NOT push. Reversible via git reset.

p191_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P191 stage reviewed files commit and push to origin main
p191_authorization_options.description: P191 stages, commits, and pushes to origin/main. Full irreversible publish.
p191_authorization_options.risk_level: HIGH (irreversible after push; verify branch protection first)

p191_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P191 rollback decision gate only
p191_authorization_options.description: P191 documents the rollback plan: restore P188 backup to production DB. No stage/commit/push.

p191_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P191 pause with migrated DB uncommitted
p191_authorization_options.description: Explicitly defer all stage/commit/push. Migrated DB stays uncommitted.

R1_committing_db_binary.description: lottery_v2.db is a binary that increases repo size by ~15-25MB. Every checkout includes the full DB.
R1_committing_db_binary.mitigation: Run PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) before staging. Consider .gitignore or git-lfs for DB if size is a concern.

R2_backup_inclusion.description: Including backup DB (~5MB) is a good audit trail but adds repo size.
R2_backup_inclusion.mitigation: Recommended: include for audit trail. Alternative: document backup path in commit message only.

R3_large_diff_repo_size.description: This commit bundles 2 DB binaries, 65+ research artifacts, 40+ tests, scripts, and docs. Very large diff.
R3_large_diff_repo_size.mitigation: Stage in groups A-H. Consider splitting into 2 commits: (1) code/tests/docs; (2) DB + backup.

R4_incomplete_staging.description: Partial staging (DB committed without drift guard or tests) leaves internally inconsistent commit.
R4_incomplete_staging.mitigation: P191 must stage ALL whitelist groups atomically and run 644-test suite before committing.

R5_accidental_forbidden_staging.description: Working tree has .fuse_hidden*, *.pid, runtime/, DB.bak_ files. git add -A would stage these.
R5_accidental_forbidden_staging.mitigation: ABSOLUTE: explicit per-file git add only. Run forbidden scan after every add step.

R6_push_without_authorization.description: Push to origin/main requires explicit CEO authorization (Option C). Default to Option B (local commit only).
R6_push_without_authorization.mitigation: Never push unless CEO provides Option C phrase explicitly.

R7_rollback_complexity.description: After commit+push, rollback requires: restore backup to DB, revert conftest/drift guard, force-push or revert commit.
R7_rollback_complexity.mitigation: P188 backup verified. Document rollback procedure in P191 Option D.

R8_branch_protection_ci.description: Branch protection or CI may block push to main. Not verified in P190.
R8_branch_protection_ci.mitigation: P191 should check branch protection before attempting push.

R9_wal_sidecar.description: lottery_v2.db-wal and .db-shm may exist. Staging DB without checkpoint leaves inconsistent WAL state.
R9_wal_sidecar.mitigation: Run PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) first. Verify .db-wal and .db-shm are absent or empty.
